mapper.sql: id, department_id, name, description, alias, location, treatment, symptoms, treatment_period, cure_rate, examinations, follow_count, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: select from t_disease order by id desc
mapper.update: update t_disease set department_id = #{et.departmentId}, name = #{et.name}, description = #{et.description}, alias = #{et.alias}, location = #{et.location}, treatment = #{et.treatment}, symptoms = #{et.symptoms}, treatment_period = #{et.treatmentPeriod}, cure_rate = #{et.cureRate}, examinations = #{et.examinations}, follow_count = #{et.followCount}, create_time = #{et.createTime}, update_time = #{et.updateTime} where id = #{et.id}
